title: thymus × moralesii nothosubsp. moralesii
intro: Thymus × moralesii nothosubsp. moralesii, also known as the Thymus × moralesii hybrid, is a plant that results from the cross-breeding of Thymus mastichina and Thymus camphoratus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Thymus × moralesii nothosubsp. moralesii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. Thymus × moralesii nothosubsp. moralesii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
